$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for bugfix-agent responses (Story 7.2-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; extra fields allowed for forward-compat.
title: BugfixAgentResponse
description: Structured result returned by a bugfix agent dispatched by the orchestrator.

failure_category.description: Failure classification (bugfix-agent vocabulary CODE_BUG/TEST_BUG/ENV_ISSUE, plus orchestrator routing categories).

root_cause.description: What broke and why — the defect behind the failure, not a restatement of the symptom (Story 26.1-001).

issue_number.description: GitHub issue the agent opened, when applicable.

fix_status.description: Whether the bugfix agent resolved the failure.

tests_passing.description: Whether the test suite is green after the fix.

bugs_fixed.description: Count of distinct bugs the agent fixed.

tests_fixed.description: Count of failing tests the agent made pass.

finding_dispositions.description: Per-review-finding disposition (Story 26.2-001). Present only when the bugfix was dispatched with review findings: every finding the agent processed, each verified against the code and marked implemented or disputed. A dispute is structured data the controller surfaces, not prose lost in a log.

finding.description: The review finding being addressed — a short identifier or restatement so the disposition is traceable to its finding.

disposition.description: implemented = verified against the code and fixed; disputed = refuted against the code with concrete technical reasoning.

reasoning.description: Concrete technical reasoning for the disposition. Required and non-empty when disposition is 'disputed' — a dispute without reasoning is performative, not a refutation.
